plan_metrics.plan_content:
Here's the complete implementation plan:

---

## Plan: Custom Theme System

**7 files touched** (2 new in `packages/shared`, 2 new in `apps/web`, 3 modified).

### What's being built

A named colour-palette system layered on top of the existing light/dark toggle. Three built-in themes — **T3 Light**, **T3 Dark**, **T3 Midnight** — each carry 7 colour slots (background, foreground, accent, sidebar, editor, terminal, statusBar). Themes persist to `localStorage` at `"t3code:color-theme"` and are applied via `element.style.setProperty()` (inline styles, which beat `:root` and `@variant dark` CSS rules with no specificity tricks needed). Derived tokens like `--card`, `--border`, `--muted` reference `var(--background)` / `var(--foreground)` so they pick up the overridden seeds automatically.

### Files

| File | Change |
|---|---|
| `packages/shared/src/theme.ts` | **New** — `ThemeColors`, `ThemeDefinition`, `BuiltInThemeId`, `BUILT_IN_THEMES`, helpers |
| `packages/shared/package.json` | **Edit** — add `"./theme"` subpath export |
| `apps/web/src/components/ThemeProvider.tsx` | **New** — context, `ThemeProvider`, `useColorTheme` hook, eager module-load apply (no flash) |
| `apps/web/src/components/ThemeSelector.tsx` | **New** — radio-group UI with 3 colour swatches (background · accent · sidebar) per theme |
| `apps/web/src/index.css` | **Edit** — add `--theme-sidebar`, `--theme-editor`, `--theme-terminal`, `--theme-statusbar` fallbacks inside `:root` |
| `apps/web/src/router.ts` | **Edit** — nest `ThemeProvider` inside the `Wrap` chain alongside `StoreProvider` |
| `apps/web/src/routes/_chat.settings.tsx` | **Edit** — add `ThemeSelector` in a new "Color theme" sub-section of Appearance |

### Key decisions
- **`useColorTheme`** (not `useTheme`) — the existing hook owns `"light" | "dark" | "system"`; a distinct name prevents confusion and lets both coexist
- Theme type lives in **`packages/shared`** (plain TS interfaces), not `packages/contracts` (Effect Schema only)
- `ThemeProvider` goes in **`router.ts` Wrap** for earliest-possible mount, consistent with `StoreProvider`
